candidate.notes: same label 'wall feature' across non-adjacent places

object_a.label: wall feature
object_a.description: small American flag hanging on left wall
object_a.long_form_open_description: Small fabric American flag on a string, vertically hung about chest height on the left hallway wall; colors red/white/blue visible, flag is narrow and roughly 30-40 cm tall, hung from a single nail or hook.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: hung on left wall between the doorway trim (left foreground) and the central opening into the dining room
object_a.object_text_short: small American flag hanging on left wall
object_a.object_text_long: left sector | Small fabric American flag on a string, vertically hung about chest height on the left hallway wall; colors red/white/blue visible, flag is narrow and roughly 30-40 cm tall, hung from a single nail or hook.

object_b.label: wall feature
object_b.description: small hanging American flag on center wall
object_b.long_form_open_description: Small fabric American flag hung vertically from a small nail or hook on the flat central wall section at about chest/head height. Flag is narrow and about the size of a hand towel or small banner, with visible red and white stripes and blue canton.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Mounted on the center wall roughly two meters down the corridor, to the right of the large left-wall painting and just left of the open doorway leading to the adjacent room.
object_b.object_text_short: small hanging American flag on center wall
